title: Malaysian Broiled Cheese
description: A fusion of Malaysian flavors with the comfort of broiled cheese, perfect for a snack or light meal.
instructions: 2. Place the broiled cheese on a baking sheet.
3. Spoon the Malaysian Sambal Sauce over the cheese.
4. Sprinkle chopped cilantro over the top.
5. Place the baking sheet under the broiler for 2-3 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
6. Remove from the oven and let cool for a minute.
